instructions: Review classification.existing_matches and classification.novel_categories. Edit, add, or remove entries, then re-run with --resume (without --classify-only) to apply.

policy.clause: Design or develop weaponization and delivery processes for the deployment of weapons.

novel_categories.summary: Requests for instructions or operational guidance on converting a weapon or weaponizable agent into a deployable weapon, including arming, configuring, or preparing it for use, when the specific weapon type is not otherwise covered by an existing leaf.
novel_categories.policy_fragment: Design or develop weaponization processes for the deployment of weapons

policy.clause: Design or develop weaponization and delivery processes for the deployment of weapons.
policy.matched_segment: Design or develop weaponization processes for the deployment of weapons

novel_categories.reasoning: This specifically requests operational guidance for converting or preparing weapons for deployment. No existing leaf in the catalog squarely covers generic weaponization across weapon types; the closest leaves are weapon-type-specific or military/warfare-adjacent rather than weaponization itself.

novel_categories.summary: Requests for actionable guidance on planning, optimizing, or executing the delivery, transport, concealment, or deployment process for weapons, including how to get weapons to a target or place them for use.
novel_categories.policy_fragment: Design or develop delivery processes for the deployment of weapons

policy.clause: Design or develop weaponization and delivery processes for the deployment of weapons.
policy.matched_segment: Design or develop delivery processes for the deployment of weapons

novel_categories.reasoning: This specifically requests actionable guidance on delivering or deploying weapons. The existing 'Military' leaf is too broad and does not squarely cover weapon delivery logistics as a distinct unsafe behavior.
